prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-GOLDPANKIT-17PC-BUN Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 17pc Ultimate Miner's Gold Prospecting Kit Folding Aluminum Sluice Box, Sifting Pans and Collection Tools Description: Take your prospecting adventures to the next level with the ASR Outdoor 17pc Ultimate Miner's Gold Prospecting Kit. Designed for dedicated beginners and experienced prospectors alike, this comprehensive kit includes the essential tools needed for gold recovery, material classification, collection, and inspection in a convenient all-in-one package.

At the center of the kit is a lightweight folding aluminum sluice box engineered for portability and efficient fine gold recovery. Its compact foldable design makes it easy to transport to streams, rivers, and remote prospecting locations while providing dependable performance in the field.

The kit also includes three dual riffle gold pans in 8-inch, 10-inch, and 12-inch sizes, allowing you to process material through multiple stages of separation and recovery. A tri-fold shovel, heavy-duty green scoop, and high-visibility orange trowel provide versatile digging and material handling options for a variety of prospecting environments.

For improved efficiency, two mini classifiers help sort material before panning, while the included 8 lb and 16 lb magnetic black sand separators assist in removing unwanted magnetic material that can obscure fine gold. Once valuable material has been recovered, use the dual 3 oz snifter bottles for collection and transfer, then securely store your findings in the included 3/4 dram and 3 dram glass vials.

To complete the setup, the kit includes prospector's gloves for hand protection and a gemstone quality inspection tool for detailed viewing of gold, gemstones, minerals, and other recovered materials. Whether you're exploring mountain streams, riverbanks, or local creeks, this 17-piece prospecting kit provides the tools needed to help maximize your recovery and enjoy the search for treasure. Search Terms: gold prospecting kit, gold sluice box kit, folding sluice box, gold panning kit, gold mining equipment, gold pans set, black sand magnet tool, gold classifier sieve, snifter bottle gold, gold collection vials, prospecting shovel, advanced gold mining kit Features: - COMPLETE 17PC PROSPECTING KIT - Includes folding aluminum sluice box 3 dual riffle gold pans shovel scoop trowel classifiers magnetic separators snifter bottles collection vials gloves and gemstone quality inspection tool - FOLDING ALUMINUM SLUICE BOX - Lightweight portable design folds for transport and storage while helping capture fine gold and concentrate material during recovery - THREE DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS - Includes 8 inch 10 inch and 12 inch pans for processing material through multiple stages of separation and gold recovery - BLACK SAND SEPARATION TOOLS - Features both 8 lb and 16 lb magnetic separator tools to remove magnetic material and improve visibility of valuable concentrates - DIG SORT COLLECT AND INSPECT - Equipped with digging tools classifiers collection accessories protective gloves and a gemstone quality inspection tool for field and hobby use === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 17pc Gold Prospecting Kit Folding Sluice Box

tokens.name: Gold Prospecting Kit Folding Sluice Box

anthropic.title_differentiation: Folding Aluminum Sluice Box, 3 Gold Pans, Black Sand Separators, Classifiers, Collection Vials, Inspection Tool

openai.title_differentiation: Folding Aluminum Sluice Box, 3 Gold Pans, Magnetic Black Sand Separators, Classifiers, Snifter Bottles
